violations.text: The floor in the (3-bay sink) area has a few rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and other items were observed in the back ware-washing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Rodent droppings observed throughout the back warewashing area underneath shelving, unnecessary clutter and various items. Per PIC warewashing area shall be cleaned and clutter removed by next week. -Establishment shall contact pest control service to do a full evaluation/assessment of the facility. -Proof of pest control service must be provided to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (refrigerators) and other items were observed in the back ware-washing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. -Per PIC, refrigerators will be removed by 12/02/25. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Rodent droppings observed throughout the back warewashing area underneath shelving, unnecessary clutter and various items. Per PIC warewashing area shall be cleaned and clutter removed by next week. -Establishment shall contact pest control service to do a full evaluation/assessment of the facility. -Proof of pest control service must be provided to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (refrigerators) or items were observed in the back ware-washing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. -Per PIC, refrigerators will be removed by 12/02/25. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

A dead mouse observed on a glue trap in the back warewashing area. Staff removed the dead mouse during this inspection. -Establishment shall contact pest control service to do a full evaluation/assessment of the facilty. -Proof of pest control service must be provided to inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (refrigerators) or items were observed in the back ware-washing area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. -Per PIC, refrigerators will be removed by 12/02/25. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the restroom and retail area were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The establishment had signs of housing a cat (such as used litter box and cat cage). PIC instructed to remove items from establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The area behind the dumpsters were observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas and enclosures must be maintained free of clutter and debris to prevent pest harborage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The back ware-washing area was observed with an accumulation of old rodent droppings and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
The hand-washing sink in the employee restroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
Fly strips observed in back area near walk-in cooler storage. PIC instructed to remove strip at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings observed on back table (table only used for employee personal belongings) and throughout floor of back area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The area around the dumpster was observed with an accumulation of debris (trash debris mixed in large amounts of leaves). Refuse areas and enclosures must be kept free of debris to prevent pest harborage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The floors throughout the back area have an accumulation of standing water and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
